summary: Completed testing for Iteration 36 - E-Commerce Core Features. Backend tests: 32/32 passed. Frontend: All 5 new pages (OrderTrackingPage, WishlistPage, CustomerAccountPage) working correctly for both India (/tnv) and Pakistan (/tnv-pk) stores. All APIs functional including Order Tracking, Wishlist, Product Reviews, Customer Dashboard, Address Management, Stock Notifications, and Recently Viewed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ecommerce.py has comprehensive APIs with proper Pydantic models for all features
Order Tracking API returns timeline with status icons, colors, and estimated delivery
Wishlist API supports add, remove, share, and move-to-cart operations
Product Reviews API has moderation workflow (pending/approved/rejected status)
Customer Dashboard API aggregates orders_count, pending_orders, wishlist_count, reviews_count
Address Management API supports CRUD with default address handling
Stock Notifications API prevents duplicate subscriptions
Frontend components use data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend uses localStorage for customer_id and session_id persistence
Both stores (tnvcollection/tnvcollectionpk) use correct base URLs and store parameters
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (wishlists, reviews, addresses, stock notifications)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested E-Commerce Core Features. Key findings: Backend API at /api/ecommerce/* provides full CRUD for orders, wishlists, reviews, addresses, stock notifications, recently viewed. Frontend pages: OrderTrackingPage at /tnv/track, WishlistPage at /tnv/wishlist, CustomerAccountPage at /tnv/account with tabs (Dashboard, My Orders, Addresses, Settings). Pakistan store equivalents at /tnv-pk/*. All 32 backend tests passed. Header navigation to wishlist and account pages working.

backend_api.GET /api/ecommerce/reviews/pending: PASS - Returns pending reviews for moderation

order_tracking_page.India store /tnv/track: PASS - Shows search form with order ID input and Track button
order_tracking_page.Pakistan store /tnv-pk/track: PASS - Shows TNV PK logo and Pakistan flag

wishlist_page.India store /tnv/wishlist: PASS - Shows empty state with 'Start Shopping' button
wishlist_page.Start Shopping button: PASS - Links to store home page
wishlist_page.Share Wishlist button: PASS - Only visible when items exist

customer_account_page.Dashboard tab: PASS - Shows 4 summary cards (Total Orders, Pending, Wishlist, Reviews)
customer_account_page.My Orders tab: PASS - Shows recent orders or empty state
customer_account_page.Addresses tab: PASS - Shows Add New button and address list
customer_account_page.Settings tab: PASS - Shows Customer ID and Store name
customer_account_page.Add Address modal: PASS - Form with all fields (Label, Full Name, Phone, Email, Address, City, State, Postal Code, Country)
customer_account_page.data-testid attributes: PASS - tab-dashboard, tab-orders, tab-addresses, tab-settings, add-address-btn, save-address-btn
